title: NVIDIA Unveils RTX Spark: A Closer Look
sentences: NVIDIA Unveils RTX Spark: A Closer Look NVIDIA and Microsoft are back in the headlines following the unveiling of a recent 'superchip', namely RTX Spark, which is designed to completely reinvent Windows PCs for the AI era.
